message:
fix: use drillToAlert instead of cluster drilldown for alert clicks (#3198) (#3200)

ActiveAlerts.handleAlertClick was opening a 'cluster' type drilldown,
which rendered ClusterDrillDown and showed "No cluster selected" since
the data wasn't in the expected format. Now correctly calls drillToAlert()
which opens the AlertDrillDown view with proper alert metadata.

Closes #3198

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
